title: Allow for custom workspace permissions similar to custom roles at the account level
excerpt: The CIO organization at our company manages the account-level permissions.  And organizations within the company will manage their respective workspaces.  The current workspace permissions of Workspace Owner, Workspace M…

posts.author: thansen (Terri Hansen Ramirez)
posts.cookedHtml: The CIO organization at our company manages the account-level permissions. And organizations within the company will manage their respective workspaces. The current workspace permissions of Workspace Owner, Workspace Member and Workspace Non-Member are not sufficient for supporting the number of user personas we’ll have in our workspace. So having the ability to create custom workspace permissions will solve our issue.
